summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system failed to complete the task, repeatedly reiterated the same “cannot verify from accessible sources” status across multiple WebSurfer turns (step repetition), kept going until max rounds instead of stopping once blocked (unaware of termination conditions), never escalated a clarification/request for alternate input despite lacking accessible data (fail to ask for clarification), offered an unsupported “best-supported exact compound” candidate without verifying required food-additive and linked-record criteria (disobey task specification; weak/no verification), and then terminated without a valid answer.
